overview: Hormones by Design specializes in hormone therapy for women in perimenopause and menopause, with care also available for women and men seeking hormone balancing as they age. The clinic offers injectable BHRT, oral medications, time-released pellets, thyroid balancing, and lab testing.
targetAudience: Women in perimenopause and menopause are the specialty, with services also available for women and men as they age.
